rules.rule_text:
rule CoreFlood_ldr_strings
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Baskin"
		date = "13 Feb 14"
		comment = "CoreFlood Trojan Loader Strings"
		reference = "http://www.ghettoforensics.com/2014/02/malware-with-no-strings-attached-part-2.html"

	strings:
		$RegKey = "MlLrqtuhA3x0WmjwNM27"
		$API = "3etProcAddr"

	condition:
		all of them
}
